task: Given current coreboot AtomBIOS v2 diagnostics-only path for Google Vilboz Picasso/Raven2 DCN1 and logs showing map_oprom_vendev selects pci1002,15dd.rom while the custom loader selects 15d8, decide the immediate root-cause fixes and the shortest credible route to visible display without option ROM/payload fallback. Distinguish VBIOS mapping bug from absence of DCN1 scanout backend. Review local files as needed, do not edit.
